untranslatable_reason: Beta calculation (ex-ante estimated beta) and decile-based portfolio sorting are not available in the allowed indicators list. This signal requires custom beta estimation and cross-sectional portfolio construction that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.). The strategy requires factor model inputs and portfolio-level grouping logic, not individual stock price data.
translation_notes: Betting Against Beta is a factor-based strategy requiring: (1) ex-ante beta estimation via regression models, (2) cross-sectional stock sorting into 10 deciles, and (3) portfolio-level construction. These operations are fundamentally different from single-indicator technical conditions. The allowed indicator set contains only price-action and momentum-based metrics; it lacks the capability for beta estimation or systematic cross-sectional ranking. Implementation requires a dedicated factor model engine, not a standard backtest engine using technical indicators.
